---
id: userland-user-identities-controller-get
title: "Get user identities"
description: "Get a list of identities associated with the user. A user can have multiple associated identities after going through [identity linking](/authkit/identity-linking). Currently only OAuth identities are supported. More provider types may be added in the future."
sidebar_label: "Get user identities"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get user identities"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/user_management/users/{id}/identities"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get a list of identities associated with the user. A user can have multiple associated identities after going through [identity linking](/authkit/identity-linking). Currently only OAuth identities are supported. More provider types may be added in the future.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
